contexts.context: Dear Stella: 0012        Many thanks for your <mark>nice</mark> long letter. Stephen has a genius for 0013...
...Auden or whatever? 0086 If so it would be <mark>nice</mark> to know about it so I can refer to...
...the kitchen not to cancel. 0010 Have a <mark>nice</mark> winter and will see you, I hope, 0011...
...compared the two, verse by verse. 0525      "How <mark>nice</mark> to see you" said Auden who was sitting on...
...disciplined 0905 writers, who knew, none better, how <mark>nice</mark> it is to sit sipping 0906 a cool drink...
